container_member_model: Target/container/member summaries use public-safe logical identifiers only and include no payloads.
executable_payload_risk_policy: Executable references require risk labels; no execution or malware safety claim.
extraction_policy: contract_only; runtime disabled; sandbox/resource/privacy/executable policies required before runtime.
manifest_metadata_model: Manifest metadata summaries are allowed as contract shape; raw manifests and rights/safety claims are not.
nested_recursion_depth_limit_model: Recursive extraction disabled now; future Tier 4/5 require sandbox, size, member, depth, time, and approval limits.
next_recommended_branch: P96 Search Result Explanation Contract v0
notes: P95 is contract-only. It adds no extraction runtime and performs no extraction, file opening, unpacking, execution, OCR, transcription, external calls, URL fetching, telemetry, or mutations.
package_archive_ISO_WARC_WACZ_source_bun: Metadata-only future handling for packages, archives, ISO, WARC/WACZ, source bundles, scanned volumes, PDFs, and installers.
privacy_path_secret_policy: Reject absolute/private/traversal paths, credentials, private URLs, account/user identifiers, and raw private query data.
public_search_object_page_result_explana: Public search and pages may later cite reviewed summaries/gaps; they must not trigger live extraction.
rights_risk_provenance_policy: Preserve provenance; metadata is not rights clearance, malware safety, source completeness, or truth.
sandbox_resource_limit_model: Runtime blocked until sandbox and resource limits are approved.
selective_text_model: Short summaries only; no raw text dumps or copyrighted payload excerpts.
source_cache_evidence_candidate_relation: Future source-cache/evidence/candidate outputs are disabled now and review-required later.
synthetic_record_generation_boundary: Future generated records are provisional candidates only and require review.
